underlying_goal: Set up and develop a React Native/Expo pet health app (PetsauLife) from scratch, including dependencies, project structure, database schema, authentication, and initial screens
friction_detail: Repeated text-node-in-View errors in Input.tsx took multiple attempts to fix, SecureStore web incompatibility wasn't anticipated, Supabase auth flow redirected to login after registration, and Android build failed due to SDK/path issues.
brief_summary: User wanted to scaffold and develop a React Native pet health app; project structure and dependencies were set up but repeated runtime bugs, web compatibility issues, and failed Android builds caused significant friction and user frustration.
